info.title: Akkoma API
info.description: Akkoma and Pleroma-compatible REST API for federated social networking. Includes custom Akkoma endpoints, Pleroma-specific endpoints, emoji management, and MFA support.

get.summary: Get bubble timeline for local and closely related instances
List custom emoji on the server

list.description: Whitespace-separated list of accounts or file

max_id.description: Mark all up to this ID as read

post.summary: Subscribe to notifications from a user's posts
Unsubscribe from notifications from a user's posts

get.summary: Get server health and system metrics

put.summary: Add emoji reaction to a post

delete.summary: Remove emoji reaction from a post

get.summary: Get accounts that reacted with a specific emoji
List all emoji reactions on a post
Get emoji pack metadata and files
